name: Ortega 7-layer Dip
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Ortega refried beans (from a 16-ounce can)
1 cup Sargento 4 Cheese Mexican Recipe Blend
4 ounces of Ortega Diced Green Chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the refried beans and taco seasoning mix.
2. Spread the bean mixture in an 8-inch-square dish.
3. Top with sour cream, guacamole, cheese blend, salsa, chiles, and sliced green onions.
4. The dip can be prepared up to 2 hours ahead and chilled.
5. Serve with tortilla chips.
